tasks.title: Establish verified project baseline and bounded work graph

checks.description: Verify harness directory and required files exist

checks.note: Review obtained post-task from weave-reviewer subagent (fresh context). Evidence file created after review.

tasks.title: Accessibility and interaction audit of winter_road.html
acceptance_criteria: All 9 poems are present with correct IDs and authored text (machine-verifiable).
SEMANTIC_GRID, DESKTOP_CELLS, MOBILE_CELLS match baseline values (machine-verifiable).
CONFIG timing constants match baseline values (machine-verifiable).
All ARIA attributes required by PROJECT.md success criteria are present (code inspection).
No external resource URLs (script, link, img, fetch) appear in the source (machine-verifiable).
Self-contained size under 100 KB (file size check).
focus-visible styles present for all interactive elements (code inspection).
prefers-reduced-motion handling present and correct (code inspection).
Statement dialog focus management: showModal, focus on statementCopy, focus return to signature (code inspection).
Findings document lists all identified gaps with severity and whether they violate authored intent or are open questions.

command: import json, re; html = open('winter_road.html').read(); poems = ['winter-road-absence-wind','winter-road-darkness-wind','winter-road-only-wind','winter-darkness-road-driven','dark-road-only-wind','winter-silence-only-wind','winter-road-white-absence','winter-darkness-white','winter-road-absence-white']; missing = [p for p in poems if p not in html]; print('PASS' if not missing else 'FAIL missing: ' + str(missing))
import re; html = open('winter_road.html').read(); hits = re.findall(r'(?:src|href|url)\s*[=:(][\s\'"]*https?://', html, re.I); print('PASS' if not hits else 'FAIL external: ' + str(hits))
import os; sz = os.path.getsize('winter_road.html'); print(f'PASS {sz} bytes' if sz < 102400 else f'FAIL {sz} bytes > 100KB')

tasks.human_checkpoint_note: Review AUDIT-01 findings before proceeding to any patch work. Artistic and design decisions require human authority.
tasks.next_action: Run checks, produce findings.md, obtain review, then surface to human checkpoint.
